title: Incompatible errors between tidb and mysql about `GROUP_CONCAT`
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t(a INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1),(2);
SELECT (SELECT 1
	FROM t
	WHERE CONVERT(1 USING gbk) <> GROUP_CONCAT(x'a3')
);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

In MySQL 8, the result is 

```
mysql> SELECT (SELECT 1
    -> FROM t
    -> WHERE CONVERT(1 USING gbk) <> GROUP_CONCAT(x'a3')
    -> );
ERROR 3854 (HY000): Cannot convert string '\xA3' from binary to gbk
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

In TiDB, the result is 

```
tidb> SELECT (SELECT 1
    -> FROM t
    -> WHERE CONVERT(1 USING gbk) <> GROUP_CONCAT(x'a3')
    -> );
ERROR 1111 (HY000): Invalid use of group function
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT, name VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4);
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE CONVERT(name USING gbk) IS NULL);
SELECT (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE CONVERT(name USING gbk) <> (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONVERT(name USING utf8mb4)) FROM test_table));
SELECT (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE id > 0 AND CONVERT(1 USING gbk) <> (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONVERT(x'c2a3' USING utf8mb4))));
key_bug_features: GROUP_CONCAT with character set conversion in SQL query
